title: Creating a Valid HTML Table
scenario: Given a list of table data, generate an HTML table with the correct structure and formatting. Ensure the table has a header row, a footer row, and each row has a unique class or id attribute. The table should also include basic CSS styles for alignment and padding.
constraints: Must include a header row with column headers
Must include a footer row with a summary or total
Must use a unique class or id attribute for each row

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the table have the correct structure and formatting?
Are the CSS styles correctly applied for alignment and padding?
Are unique class or id attributes used for each row?
Are the header and footer rows correctly implemented?
